title: unset E2E_ASSIGNEE_USER_ID in fanout + korczewski drift report
description:
## Summary

- `scripts/systemtest-fanout.sh`: explicitly `unset E2E_ASSIGNEE_USER_ID` before each cycle — the var is realm-specific (Keycloak UUID) and leaked from a prior mentolder run into the korczewski fanout, causing every `/api/admin/questionnaires/assign` call to send the mentolder UUID and get Keycloak 404 → "Benutzer nicht gefunden."
- `docs/drift-reports/2026-05-09-systemtest-korczewski.md`: first full korczewski drift report — 12/12 templates, 103 steps, 92.7% compliance, 0 failures

## Test Plan

- [x] `task systemtest:all ENV=korczewski` — all 4 cycles pass (12/12 specs, `==> All 3 sessions completed`)
- [x] `task test:all` — offline tests still green
